title: Dead Channel Protocol - Interference and Doubt Arc Key Art
prompt: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Arc focus: Interference and Doubt (MIDDLE). Summary: Villain contact escalates while ally trust becomes volatile.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
